headline: Audeo Ventures' Fund II Reaches $65 Million
summary: Audeo Ventures, a top-performing venture capital firm specializing in early-stage investments, today announced that it exceeded its $50 million Fund II target and has achieved $65 million, on track to close at the end of this month. The close follows a $17.5 million raise for Fund I.
